C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libexpression.a CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/expression_api.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/error.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/memory.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/benchmark.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/testing.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/visualization.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/shunting_yard.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/postfix_eval.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/syntax_check.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/infix_eval.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_build.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_eval.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_prefix.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_constant_fold.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/simplify.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/substitute.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/differentiate.c.obj CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/equal.c.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libexpression.a
